data.title: Morrison launches Fillex to support growth of ecommerce pharmacy fulfillment
data.description: The company will be led by CEO Dain Rusk, a longtime pharmacy executive who most recently served as vice president of pharmacy at Publix Super Markets.

data.title: Thomas rolls out AI search and performance-based ads to speed industrial sourcing
data.description: The launches underscore intensifying competition among industrial marketplaces to apply AI to supplier discovery.

data.title: WD-40 ecommerce sales jump 22% in Q1
data.description: Chief financial officer Sara Hyzer said the company expects performance to strengthen later in the year as distributor ordering normalizes and digital initiatives continue to scale.

data.title: Walmart takes to the skies nationwide with Wing drone delivery expansion
data.description: The announcement comes on the heels of a recent expansion into Atlanta after debuting in Dallas.

data.title: Gartner: 60% of brands will use agentic AI for one-to-one engagement
data.description: By 2027, brands will allocate 50% of influencer marketing budgets to initiatives focused on content authenticity and creator credibility, the firm said.
